title: 400 PCS Picture Hanging Kit - Assorted Hooks for Frames and Photos, Perfect for Hard Walls - Includes Saw Tooth Hangers, D-Rings, Nails, and Wire for Easy Installation
features: 400 picture hanging kit includes : This all-in-one set includes 25 hooks rated for 10 lbs, 15 hooks rated for 20 lbs, 10 hooks rated for 30 lbs, 8 hooks rated for 40 lbs, 4 hooks rated for 75 lbs, 175 nails, 10 D-rings, 7 assorted nails (1.5 in), 10 circular hooks, 30 sawtooth hangers, 100 screws, and 5 frame hooks (1 stainless steel wire, 3m long).
Durable and Rust-Resistant Material: Our picture hangers are constructed from high-quality, rust-resistant stainless steel, ensuring long-lasting strength and flexibility without deformation.
Versatile Hanging Options: This hanging kit offers a variety of hooks, allowing you to efficiently hang frames and items of all sizes, keeping your space organized and stylish.
Perfect for Various Artworks: Ideal for photos, canvases, signs, bulletin boards, digital art, decorative clocks, colorful wooden projects, cross-stitch work, and more.
Convenient Storage and Reusability: The picture frame hook kit is neatly packaged in a transparent case, making installation and removal a breeze for easy reuse and organization.
